mapper.select: /* wms-file-sql-oracle.xml - selectFileInfoList */ SELECT CTKEY , FILEKEY , FILESEQNO , FILEPATH , FILESIZE , FILEEXTS , ORGFILENM , SAVFILENM , CMT FROM TWORK_INFO_FILE WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND FILEKEY = #{filekey}

/* wms-file-sql-oracle.xml - selectFileInfo */ SELECT CTKEY , FILEKEY , FILESEQNO , FILEPATH , FILESIZE , FILEEXTS , ORGFILENM , SAVFILENM , CMT FROM TWORK_INFO_FILE WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND FILEKEY = #{filekey} AND FILESEQNO = #{fileseqno}
